_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn that our body belongs to us.

_source.w: We learn that our body belongs to us.
y: Body autonomy is a fundamental right that keeps us safe.
Understanding that our body is our own builds self-respect.
This knowledge helps us set boundaries and stay safe.
eg: We learn that we can say 'no' to touch we do not want.
We practise asking before touching someone else.
We learn the names of body parts and that they are private.
We talk about comfortable and uncomfortable touch.
We practise telling a trusted adult if someone makes us feel unsafe.
We learn that everyone has the right to decide about their own body.
